archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Archetype 4) - Adapted for Local Service

rules: No Inter, Roboto, or generic AI sans-serifs.
Avoid all-caps for sentences. Use sentence case or Title Case for better readability.
Headings should be bold, highly legible, with tracking-tight spacing.
Ensure strong contrast for text over red backgrounds (use pure white text).

layout_spacing.rule: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12 for containers to provide breathing room. Containers with borders must have internal padding.
layout_spacing.grid_style: Bento Grid for Services. Clear, defined boundaries. 1px borders with subtle shadow on hover.
layout_spacing.hero_overlay: bg-black/40 maximum. If the image isn't clear, use a solid color background instead of muddying the image.

pages.home: Hero with strong CTA (Call/View Sizes), Services Overview (Grid with icons), Skip Bin Size teaser, Testimonials/Trust signals.
pages.skip_bin_sizes: Product representations using custom SVG/CSS of red Marrel bins (2m³, 3m³, 4m³, 6m³). Prominent 'Contact us for pricing' CTA on each bin card.
pages.waste_guide: Split view or clear dual lists: Do's (Green checks) vs Don'ts (Red crosses). Info on E-Waste and General Waste.
pages.delivery_area: Google Maps iframe (embedded for Port Augusta SA 5700) + Grid of tags/pills for towns (Port Augusta, Blanche Harbor, Miranda, Quorn, etc.).
pages.about_us: Story of being family-run, locally owned. Emphasize 'reliable, honest, affordable, eco-friendly'.
pages.faq: Shadcn accordion with 6 questions about paint, mattresses, hire duration, green waste, mixed waste, payments.
pages.contact_us: Contact form (Name, Email, Phone, Message) + Company contact info and Facebook link.

skip_bin_visual.instructions: Since there are no photos, build a React component using raw SVG (like an angled trapezoid/Marrel shape) or styled divs to represent a skip bin in the primary red (#bf0403). Size variations should be visually distinct (e.g., 2m³ is shorter, 6m³ is taller with a walk-in door represented).

service_cards.instructions: Use lucide-react icons. Less words, more visual punch. E.g., a huge Wrench icon for 'Construction Waste'. Use standard Shadcn Card components but remove default heavy borders, adding a subtle 1px gray border and red hover accent.

navigation.instructions: Sticky header, white background, black text. Primary phone number displayed prominently as a red CTA button.

hero_image.usage: Main hero background overlay on the homepage or Delivery Area page.

construction_worker.usage: Background or accent image for the Services section or Commercial skip hire section.

recycling_waste.usage: Header image or side graphic for the Waste Guide page.

renovation_house.usage: Background image for the Skip Bin Sizes header or residential hire section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons, as this will help visually communicate services without long text (e.g., icons for white goods, furniture, batteries, mattresses).

For the Skip Bin visualizations, DO NOT use external image URLs since the client has no photos. Code an inline SVG component that visually represents a trapezoid (Marrel) skip bin in red (#bf0403), adjusting height/width based on the size prop (2m³, 3m³, 4m³, 6m³).
Ensure 'Contact us for pricing' is displayed clearly on bin items instead of fixed prices.
Integrate a Google Maps iframe for Port Augusta (Address: 3 Osborne St, Port Augusta SA 5700) on the Delivery Area page.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Build the contact form using Shadcn UI form components. Handle the submission with a mock toast notification (Sonner).
Keep typography simple and clean. Use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text.
Focus on mobile responsiveness. The layout should look great on phones since many users will be tradies or homeowners on the go.
